response: The voice actress in the animated film Alpha and Omega, Kate Higgins, voiced Sakura Haruno in "Naruto," C.C. in "Code Geass," Saber in "Fate/stay Night," and Kate, Stinky, and Lilly in the "Alpha and Omega" sequels. She also voiced Miles "Tails" Prower in the "Sonic the Hedgehog" video game series.
